    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    P

    Path - Annotation Interface in com.habbashx.annotation
    Binds a method parameter to a named placeholder in the URI template.
    PathQueryInterceptor - Class in com.habbashx.Interceptor
    Interceptor that resolves Path and Query annotations on method parameters, producing the final URL before the HTTP request is dispatched.
    PathQueryInterceptor(MethodCache) - Constructor for class com.habbashx.Interceptor.PathQueryInterceptor
     
    POST - Enum constant in enum class com.habbashx.request.HttpMethod
    The HTTP POST method — submits data to be processed by the server.
    POST - Static variable in class com.habbashx.request.RequestMethod
    Strategy for HTTP POST — publishes the body string via BodyPublishers.ofString().
    PUT - Enum constant in enum class com.habbashx.request.HttpMethod
    The HTTP PUT method — replaces the target resource with the request payload.
    PUT - Static variable in class com.habbashx.request.RequestMethod
    Strategy for HTTP PUT — publishes the body string via BodyPublishers.ofString().
